Table 1. State-to-State Migration Flows1: 2024 American Community Survey 1-Year Estimates

column3: Movers to current residence from residence 1 year ago

column1: N The estimate or margin of error cannot be displayed because there were an insufficient number of sample cases in the selected geographic area.

1 States include the 50 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, and Puerto Rico. "Current residence" refers to the place of residence at the time of the survey, while "residence 1 year ago" refers to the place of residence 1 year prior to the survey.

2 The category "U.S. Island Areas" covers geographic areas in American Samoa, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, the U.S. Virgin Islands, Baker Island, Howland Island, Jarvis Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Midway Islands, Navassa Island, Palmyra Atoll, and Wake Island. The category "foreign country" covers geographic areas in foreign countries and at sea.
3 Margins of error are based on the 90 percent confidence interval.

Note: For more information on state-to-state migration flows, visit <https://www.census.gov/topics/population/migration/guidance/state-to-state-migration-flows.html>. For more information on the American Community Survey, visit <https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/acs>. The Census Bureau has reviewed this data product to ensure appropriate access, use, and disclosure avoidance protection of the confidential source data used to produce this product (Data Management System (DMS) number: P-7533841, Disclosure Review Board (DRB) approval number: CBDRB‑FY25‑0454).
Source: U.S. Census Bureau, 2024 American Community Survey.
